calendar_id.description: Calendar ID, this usually starts with cal-.

slug.description: URL slug for the calendar page (e.g. 'my-community' → lu.ma/my-community).

avatar_url.description: Specify an image that has been uploaded to the Luma CDN.

tint_color.description: Tint color for the calendar in hex format (e.g. '#E3CBEF').
